para.verbatim: Initialize connection manager.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str device_id, WebSocket ws, str public_key, list[str] capabilities, dict|None metadata=None)
memberdef.name: connect

para.verbatim:
Register a new device connection.
Args: device_id: Device identifier ws: WebSocket connection public_key: Device public key capabilities: List of device capabilities metadata: Optional metadata
Returns: DeviceInfo

Disconnect a device.
Args: device_id: Device identifier

Get device info.
Args: device_id: Device identifier
Returns: DeviceInfo or None

Check if device is connected.
Args: device_id: Device identifier
Returns: True if connected
Get set of all connected device IDs.

Send a message to a device.
Args: device_id: Target device ID message: Message dictionary
Returns: True if sent successfully

Broadcast a message to all connected devices.
Args: message: Message dictionary exclude: Device IDs to exclude
Returns: Number of devices message was sent to

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str device_id, ErrorCode code, str message, str|None request_id=None)
memberdef.name: send_error

para.verbatim:
Send an error message to a device.
Args: device_id: Target device ID code: Error code message: Error message request_id: Optional request ID
Returns: True if sent successfully

Create a new connection session.
Args: device_a: First device ID device_b: Second device ID
Returns: ConnectionSession
Get session by ID.
Get session between two devices.
Update session status.
Set session offer (SDP).
Set session answer (SDP).

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str session_id, str device_id, dict candidate)
memberdef.name: add_ice_candidate

para.verbatim: Add ICE candidate for a device.
Mark session to use relay.
Add a pending connection request.
Get requester for pending connection.
Remove pending connection request.

Update device heartbeat timestamp.
Args: device_id: Device identifier
Returns: True if device exists

Clean up stale connections.
Args: timeout: Seconds since last heartbeat
Returns: Number of devices disconnected
Manage WebSocket connections and device sessions.
